# Phaser Vendor Asset

`phaser-3.90.0-arcade-physics.min.js` is the Phaser 3.90.0 Arcade Physics distribution, vendored from:

`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/phaser@3.90.0/dist/phaser-arcade-physics.min.js`

It is loaded only after the homepage Paper Route arcade launcher is clicked. Phaser is published under the MIT License by Photon Storm Ltd.
